name: @mog/xlsx-parser-wasm
description: Rust WASM XLSX parser — pure Rust crate, build scripts only

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --release && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build:dev: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --dev && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build:bundler: wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg --release && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build:nodejs: wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg --release && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.gate:ooxml-contract: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- ooxml-contract
scripts.gate:package-graph: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- package-graph
scripts.gate:corpus-smoke: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-smoke
scripts.gate:corpus-anti-cheat: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-anti-cheat
scripts.gate:corpus-golden: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-golden
scripts.gate:perf-smoke: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-smoke --budgets file-io/xlsx/parser/testing/budgets/perf-smoke.json
scripts.gate:perf-golden: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-golden --budgets file-io/xlsx/parser/testing/budgets/perf-golden.json
scripts.gate:corpus-full: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-full
scripts.gate:perf-full: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-full --budgets file-io/xlsx/parser/testing/budgets/perf-full.json
scripts.gate:list: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --list
scripts.gate:suites: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --suites
scripts.gate:schedule: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --schedule
scripts.gate:plan:smoke: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --plan local-smoke
scripts.gate:plan:golden: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --plan ci-golden
scripts.gate:plan:full: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --plan autonomous-full
scripts.gate:check:smoke: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --check-suite local-smoke
scripts.gate:check:golden: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --check-suite ci-golden --allow-heavy
scripts.gate:check:full: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --check-suite autonomous-full --allow-heavy
scripts.gate:enforce-policy: cd ../../.. && cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- --enforce-policy
scripts.corpus:crashtest: sh -c 'test -n "$MOG_XLSX_CORPUS_DIR" || { echo "Set MOG_XLSX_CORPUS_DIR to the XLSX corpus directory" >&2; exit 1; }; cargo run --profile crashtest --bin xlsx-crashtest --features cli -- "$MOG_XLSX_CORPUS_DIR"'
